name: Strawberry Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Jello and 2 cups of boiling water together and let cool.
2. Add the mashed bananas, pineapple, and undrained frozen strawberries to the mixture.
3. Pour half of the mixture into a 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch pan and chill for 30-45 minutes.
4. Spread sour cream on top of the chilled Jello layer.
5. Add the remaining fruit and Jello mixture, then chill again.
6. Cut into squares before serving.
